component.name: SkillFishOS Tuner
component.summary: Overclock, undervolt and tune the AMD BC-250 without a terminal
Overclock, undervolt e tuning della AMD BC-250 senza terminale
Overclocking, undervolting i tuning AMD BC-250 bez terminala

description.p: The control centre for the AMD BC-250: overclock and undervolt the CPU, drive the GPU safe-point governor, control the fan, resize the shared VRAM, and manage Compute Units live — a grid of CU squares (24/32/40 presets, no reboot) with a CU health test for the silicon lottery.

Four ready presets (Stock, Performance, Turbo, Crazy), benchmark-and-rollback testing that applies a setting, stresses it and reverts if unstable, and a pop-up live monitor during any test. Multi-language (IT/EN/PL); privileged actions go through a single authenticated helper.

Il centro di controllo della AMD BC-250: overclock e undervolt della CPU, governor GPU al safe-point, controllo ventola, ridimensionamento della VRAM condivisa e gestione live delle Compute Unit — una griglia di quadratini CU (preset 24/32/40, senza riavvio) con un test di salute CU per la lotteria del silicio.

Quattro preset pronti (Stock, Performance, Turbo, Crazy), test con benchmark-e-rollback che applica un'impostazione, la stressa e la ripristina se instabile, e un monitor live durante ogni test. Multilingua (IT/EN/PL); le azioni privilegiate passano da un singolo helper autenticato.

Centrum sterowania dla AMD BC-250: overclocking i undervolting CPU, sterowanie governorem GPU w bezpiecznym punkcie pracy, kontrola wentylatora, zmiana rozmiaru współdzielonego VRAM oraz zarządzanie Compute Units na żywo — siatka kwadratów CU (presety 24/32/40, bez restartu) z testem kondycji CU dla loterii krzemowej.

Cztery gotowe presety (Stock, Performance, Turbo, Crazy), testowanie benchmark-i-rollback, które stosuje ustawienie, obciąża je testem i cofa, jeśli jest niestabilne, oraz podręczny monitor na żywo podczas każdego testu. Wielojęzyczny (IT/EN/PL); uprzywilejowane operacje przechodzą przez jeden uwierzytelniony helper.

Find-my-max wizards for CPU and GPU with per-step benchmark-and-rollback; crash-safe testing; Turbo/Crazy presets capped at the validated 2200 MHz; extreme-preset warning; anonymous silicon-lottery sharing.
GPU governor Balanced/Performance mode toggle (+11% FPS in GPU-bound loads) and the safe multi-point voltage curve.
